subject: feat(markdown): add per-code-block copy buttons and ensure text selectability
body:
Users had to open raw files to copy code snippets because the only copy
option was a full-document "Copy markdown" button. Now each fenced code
block has a "Copy" button positioned top-right, and .md-render explicitly
sets user-select: text to prevent any framework overrides.

Tags: ux, markdown, copy, accessibility
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: markdown-ux
Semver: minor
